message:
fix(freeze): add NULL check in free_var_ref and auto-derive binary name

- Add NULL prev pointer check in free_var_ref to handle frozen/static
  var_refs that were never added to the GC list
- Auto-derive output binary name from source file (e.g., _tsc.js -> _tsc)
  when -Doutput is not specified

The free_var_ref fix prevents crashes when freeing var_refs created by
frozen closures that bypass the normal GC list registration.
